summary:
Bonded lingual retainers provide superior retention after closing a midline diastema through orthodontics; they ensure stable results without relying heavily on user adherence as with other types of retainers. Given this information, \boxed{C}. To summarize Agent2’s reasoning into two sentences focusing only on key clinical points related to retaining an orthodontically closed midline diastema:

Bonded lingual retainers effectively maintain closure of a midline diastema post-orthodontic treatment due to their secure attachment and reduced dependency on patient compliance. These devices offer better outcomes than traditional removable retainers when it comes to preventing relapse.
